when_to_use: Building omnichannel customer service bots for enterprise support
Deploying voice and chat AI agents across WhatsApp, web, and IVR
Automating HR, IT helpdesk, and retail support workflows with AI
Analyzing conversation analytics across all customer touchpoints

pros: True omnichannel voice, chat and email
cons: Feels legacy next to LLM-native tools
review.verdict: Solid enterprise bot platform, but LLM-native stacks are eating this category fast — buy carefully.
review.best_for: Large enterprises needing omnichannel CX automation with vendor SLAs
review.not_for: Startups or mid-market teams that can build cheaper on LLM-native tooling
